visual_description: A man in a blue plaid shirt stands facing another man in a pink plaid shirt, who is mostly seen from the back. The man in blue appears to be speaking, with his mouth open and his gaze directed at the other man. The scene takes place indoors, with a wooden door and wall-mounted light fixtures visible in the background.
